query:
SELECT 
  u.id, 
  u.username, 
  u.role,
  u.dailyBillingEnabled,
  u.billingStartAt,
  u.billingStatus,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nas WHERE ownerId = u.id) as nas_count,
  w.balance,
  -- حساب التكلفة اليومية المتوقعة
  ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nas WHERE ownerId = u.id) * 0.50, 2) as daily_cost,
  -- حساب عدد الأيام المتبقية
  CASE 
    WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nas WHERE ownerId = u.id) > 0 
    THEN ROUND(COALESCE(w.balance, 0) / ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nas WHERE ownerId = u.id) * 0.50), 1)
    ELSE NULL 
  END as days_remaining
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN wallets w ON w.userId = u.id
WHERE u.role IN ('client', 'reseller')
ORDER BY u.id;

    WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nas WHERE ownerId = u.id) > 0 
    THEN ROUND(COALESCE(w.balance, 0) / ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nas WHERE ownerId = u.id) * 0.50), 1)
    ELSE NULL

FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN wallets w ON w.userId = u.id
WHERE u.role IN ('client', 'reseller')
